case_title: KHOURY, SAMI et al vs. MOSER, CHRISTINA MARIE et al

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, SAMI ARIKAT, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT MOSER, CHRISTINA MARIE EWELL, JEFFREY MATTHEW DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSER, CHRISTINA MARIE

J.DESMOND, JDG; P.DOWLING-TUCKETT, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA,CLERK. 9:12 AM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL ADAM BARASCH. DEFT, JEFFREY MATTHEW EWELL NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT JEFFREY MATTHEW EWELL AS FOLLOWS: POSSESSION & RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1886 MARKET STREET #1, S.F; LEASE FORFEITED; RENTS & DAMAGES OF $955.71; ATTY FEES OF $300.00; COSTS PER COST BILL. PLTF ATTY TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSER, CHRISTINA MARIE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT MOSER, CHRISTINA MARIE

JR, PRO TEM PAUL SLAVIT, CSR JOHN LEWIS, CLERK, E.MONTI COMPLT FILED: 10-20-93 2:55 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF COUNSEL, ADAM BARASCH APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT, CHRISTINA MOSER PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT JEFFREY MATTHEW EWELL NOT PRESENT. DEFAULT PROVE UP TO BE HEARD AS TO MR. EWELL ON 11-23-93. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AS FOLLOWS: IMMEDIATE REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES AT 1886 MARKET ST, APT 1. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. PAST DUE RENT FOR $500.00. WRIT TO ISSUE BUT STAYED TO 5PM DEC. 14, 1993. PLTF WAIVES ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEC DEP TO PLTF. SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT TO BE FILED AFTER PAYMENT. STIP JUDGMENT SIGNED BY DEFT IN OPEN COURT & LATR RETRIEVED FROM CLERK BY MR. BARASCH. STIP JUDGMENT TO ENTER AFTER PROVE UP OF OTHER DEFT ON 11-23-93.
